name: account.list.google
title: Status Account List Google
description: A status report of the client's Google accounts.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: A list of status values for the Google accounts.

subkeys.content: A status report of the client's Google account details.

subkeys.title: Unique identifier of the account.
subkeys.content: The unique identifier for the account.

subkeys.title: Indicates removal of the account.
subkeys.content: If `true`, the account is removed and the status item object only contains this key and the `identifier` key.

subkeys.title: Identifier of the declaration that installed the account.
subkeys.content: The identifier of the declaration that installed the account. Only present if a declaration installed the account.

subkeys.title: Account username
subkeys.content: The user name for the account.

subkeys.title: Is mail enabled
subkeys.content: A Boolean value that indicates whether the Mail app displays mail for this account.

subkeys.title: Are calendars enabled
subkeys.content: A Boolean value that indicates whether the Calendar app displays calendars and events for this account.

subkeys.title: Are contacts enabled
subkeys.content: A Boolean value that indicates whether the Contacts app displays contacts for this account.

subkeys.title: Are notes enabled
subkeys.content: A Boolean value that indicates whether the Notes app displays notes for this account.
